title: Monetdb Bugs in Subselect statements:
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testTable3 (X INT, Y VARCHAR(255), Z DOUBLE DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT X, Y, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM testTable3 inner WHERE inner.Y IS NULL AND inner.X = outer.X) AS null_count FROM testTable3 outer;
key_bug_features: Subselect statements with null values in outer query
